Browse by growth task

Start with the job, not the tool name.

Product copy

Write product descriptions, bundles, FAQs, and benefit-led copy.

Ad creative

Create hooks, visual briefs, landing page angles, and paid social variants.

SEO

Find keywords, briefs, internal links, and refresh opportunities.

Email marketing

Build lifecycle campaigns, segmentation ideas, and abandoned cart flows.

Customer support

Automate support answers, returns workflows, and pre-sale Q&A.

Image and video

Produce product visuals, UGC concepts, reels, and ad assets.

Research and analytics

Analyze reviews, competitors, pricing, and conversion leaks.

Automation

Connect AI outputs with Shopify operations and repeatable workflows.

Go-to-market AI workspace for ecommerce copy, sales emails, and repeatable workflows.

Semrush

SEO suite for keyword research, competitive analysis, content planning, and rank tracking.

Klaviyo

Email and SMS marketing platform with AI-assisted segmentation and ecommerce automations.

Gorgias

Ecommerce helpdesk with automation, macros, and AI support features.
Customer supportFreemiumAffiliate

Tidio

Live chat and AI chatbot platform for ecommerce stores.
Image and videoFreemiumAffiliate

Canva

Design platform with AI image, video, copy, and brand kit tools.

Latest playbooks

View all
Product copy

How to write Shopify product descriptions with AI

Use review mining, benefit mapping, and brand voice prompts to produce product pages that sell instead of sounding generic.
Ad creative

How to generate Facebook ad creatives for a Shopify store

Turn product benefits into hook angles, image briefs, and variant testing plans for Meta ads.
SEO

AI SEO workflow for Shopify collection and product pages

A repeatable process for keyword mapping, title rewrites, FAQ blocks, and internal links.
Email marketing

Write abandoned cart emails with AI for Shopify

Build a three-message cart recovery flow with urgency, objections, and product-specific proof.
Customer support

Use an AI chatbot to answer pre-sale Shopify questions

Create a support knowledge base from policies, sizing, shipping, and product questions.
Image and video

Create AI image briefs for ecommerce product photos

Write useful creative briefs for lifestyle shots, backgrounds, and seasonal campaigns.
